disclaimer: Operational compliance research and cited public-records compilation — not legal, tax, or accounting advice. Transformative synthesis from cited public sources; confirm licensing, bonding, permit, and code requirements with the relevant authority and licensed counsel before relying on any fact for filings or operations.

sections.title: TL;DR / Executive Summary
sections.purpose: Buyer-facing summary: coverage, fact count, status roll, and honest limits.

sections.title: Scope, Methodology & As-Of Date
sections.purpose: What's covered (trades, jurisdictions), corpus issues (#234/#266), AI-assisted synthesis disclosure, retrieval date.

sections.title: Body — Cited Compliance Record
sections.purpose: Federal baseline + per-state licensing, bonding, permits, building codes. Every claim carries STD-CITE-001 citation ref.

sections.title: Source Register (Graded)
sections.purpose: Each source: URL, grade (primary/secondary/tertiary), reliability note, harvest status, retrieved_date.

sections.title: Conflicting Sources Reconciliation
sections.purpose: Where sources disagree or jurisdiction splits apply, show disagreement + assessment. Never silently merge.

sections.title: Gaps / NOT FOUND / Open Questions
sections.purpose: REQUIRES_CONFIRMATION, NOT FOUND, ACCESS_RESTRICTED, PARKED — each names source_checked.

sections.title: Confidence Assessment
sections.purpose: Overall and per-section confidence with explicit basis (gap density, portal access limits).

sections.title: Full Citation Appendix
sections.purpose: Numbered STD-CITE-001 references: source_name — url — retrieved_date — jurisdiction.
